narrative:
Tuscarawas 2 (precinct in Stark County) has 1,157 registered voters, with 54.3% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 30.6% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 15.1%, a pronounced Republican lean of 15.5 percentage points.
